title: Comedy Hypnosis Mind Reading Mentalism Show
description: JOIN ONE OF THE UK’S TOP STAGE HYPNOTISTS & MIND READERS - DIRECT FROM LONDON’S WEST END Blending truly jaw-dropping moments, comedy & music, Mindhacker Daniel Sinclair takes you on a rollercoaster ride of your minds while laughing out loud. Prepare for the ultimate evening of amazement with two unmissable shows in one incredible night... Comedy Hypnosis Show A mesmerisingly hilarious hypnosis show where volunteers have their imaginations unlocked and realities altered, all through the power of hypnosis. Buckle up tight. Prepare to be spellbound and in fits of laughter. Choose to SEE the show or BE in the show. The Mind Reader Live A mind reading and mentalism show that will leave you on the edge of your seats. Expect Derren Brown-style mind games, comedy and full-on psychological wonder as Daniel reads volunteers’ minds and makes astonishing predictions live on stage.
